query:
-- Data Sources registry
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS data_sources (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  firm_id INT,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  source_type ENUM('document_upload','web_scrape','api_feed','market_data','regulatory','product_catalog','news_feed','competitor','custom') NOT NULL,
  url VARCHAR(1000),
  auth_type ENUM('none','api_key','oauth','basic','bearer') DEFAULT 'none',
  credentials_vault_ref VARCHAR(255),
  schedule_cron VARCHAR(100),
  priority TINYINT DEFAULT 5 COMMENT '1=highest, 10=lowest',
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  last_run_at BIGINT,
  last_success_at BIGINT,
  total_records_ingested INT DEFAULT 0,
  config_json JSON,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  INDEX idx_ds_firm (firm_id),
  INDEX idx_ds_type (source_type),
  INDEX idx_ds_active (is_active)
);

-- Ingestion Jobs tracking
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingestion_jobs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  data_source_id INT NOT NULL,
  triggered_by INT COMMENT 'user_id or null for scheduled',
  status ENUM('queued','running','completed','failed','cancelled') DEFAULT 'queued',
  progress_pct TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  records_processed INT DEFAULT 0,
  records_created INT DEFAULT 0,
  records_updated INT DEFAULT 0,
  records_skipped INT DEFAULT 0,
  records_errored INT DEFAULT 0,
  error_log TEXT,
  started_at BIGINT,
  completed_at BIGINT,
  duration_ms INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  INDEX idx_ij_source (data_source_id),
  INDEX idx_ij_status (status)
);

-- Normalized ingested records
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ingested_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  data_source_id INT NOT NULL,
  ingestion_job_id INT,
  record_type ENUM('customer_profile','organization','product','market_price','regulatory_update','news_article','competitor_intel','document_extract','entity','metric') NOT NULL,
  entity_id VARCHAR(255) COMMENT 'external unique identifier',
  title VARCHAR(500),
  content_summary TEXT,
  structured_data JSON,
  raw_data_url TEXT,
  confidence_score DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.80,
  freshness_at BIGINT COMMENT 'when the source data was current',
  tags JSON,
  is_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  verified_by INT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  INDEX idx_ir_source (data_source_id),
  INDEX idx_ir_type (record_type),
  INDEX idx_ir_entity (entity_id),
  INDEX idx_ir_confidence (confidence_score)
);

-- Market data time-series cache
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS market_data_cache (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  symbol VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  data_type ENUM('price','fx_rate','interest_rate','index','economic_indicator','commodity') NOT NULL,
  value DECIMAL(18,6) NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USD',
  source VARCHAR(100),
  observed_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  metadata_json JSON,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  INDEX idx_mdc_symbol (symbol),
  INDEX idx_mdc_type (data_type),
  INDEX idx_mdc_observed (observed_at),
  UNIQUE KEY uk_mdc_symbol_date (symbol, data_type, observed_at)
);

-- Web scrape results
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS web_scrape_results (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  data_source_id INT,
  ingestion_job_id INT,
  url VARCHAR(2000) NOT NULL,
  page_title VARCHAR(500),
  content_text MEDIUMTEXT,
  extracted_entities JSON,
  extracted_metrics JSON,
  scrape_status ENUM('success','partial','failed') DEFAULT 'success',
  http_status INT,
  content_hash VARCHAR(64),
  scraped_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  INDEX idx_wsr_source (data_source_id),
  INDEX idx_wsr_url (url(255))
);

-- Document extractions
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS document_extractions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT,
  document_id INT COMMENT 'ref to documents table',
  ingestion_job_id INT,
  extraction_type ENUM('financial_statement','tax_return','insurance_policy','investment_statement','bank_statement','pay_stub','estate_document','medical_record','custom') NOT NULL,
  extracted_data JSON NOT NULL,
  extracted_entities JSON,
  extracted_amounts JSON,
  extraction_confidence DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 0.80,
  page_count INT,
  processing_time_ms INT,
  llm_model_used VARCHAR(100),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  INDEX idx_de_user (user_id),
  INDEX idx_de_type (extraction_type)
);
